rationale: PR replaces all 7 stub providers with real Aliyun service integrations as the body claims. internal/infrastructure/llm/dashscope_provider.go implements the Provider interface's 12 methods (correction/expansion/optimization/summary/sentiment/tag-extraction/satisfaction-prediction/IVR-analysis/completeness/post-call-action/auto-fill/script-recommendation/LLM-QA) via DashScope REST API. dashscope_advanced_provider.go implements the 6 advanced provider interfaces (CommAgent, VoiceCloning, ConversationAnalytics, RingAnalysis, FullDuplex, Training). aliyun_asr_provider.go and aliyun_tts_provider.go integrate the NLS Gateway. internal/infrastructure/aliyunsms/client.go implements HMAC-SHA1 POP signing for dysmsapi. internal/infrastructure/wechat/crypto.go does AES-CBC EncodingAESKey decryption and api.go handles AccessToken refresh + customer-service text/image messages. internal/infrastructure/weibo/api.go does HMAC-SHA256 signature verification + DM API. cmd/server/main.go cleanly gates the real implementations behind `if cfg.Aliyun.DashScopeAPIKey != ""` checks and falls back to llm.NewStubProvider() / NewStub*Provider() when keys are missing — graceful degradation, not a cheat. internal/domain/ai/service_phase9.go gains SetLLMProvider injection. internal/application/sms/service.go is reshaped to accept the SMSSender interface so tests can swap implementations. service_phase9_test.go updated to match the new interface. config.go adds AliyunConfig with the 5 documented env vars. Real, substantial integration, no cheat patterns.
